# Journal

## Week 1

Started the year slow, reading more and writing less than I meant to.
The mornings have been quiet and unusually cold this January.
Planning to pick up the writing pace again next week.

# Journal

## Week 1

Started the year strong, reading more and writing more than I expected.
The mornings have been quiet and unusually cold this January.
Planning to pick up the writing pace again next week.
Added a short note about the new project idea over coffee.

# Journal

## Week 1

Started the year strong, reading more and writing more than I expected.
The mornings have been quiet and unusually cold this January.
Planning to pick up the writing pace again next week.
Added a short note about the new project idea over coffee.
Sketched the rough architecture for it in the afternoon.
